feed.title: Path Queries: Addressing Payment Reliability and Routing limitations

entry.title: Path Queries: Addressing Payment Reliability and Routing limitations
entry.summary:
The recent update to the BLIPs repository involves a significant migration of a previously discussed PR during last year's Lightning Spec meeting. This transition was not merely a shift in repository but also included substantial enhancements and revisions, particularly to the wire format originally outlined in the `Specification`. These updates extend further into the `Motivation` and `Rationale` sections where new insights have been incorporated.
Significant efforts were made to address potential concerns that might arise with the changes, as well as to provide a comprehensive comparison with related projects like Trampoline and Probabilistic Pathfinding, spearheaded by @t-bast and @renepickhardt respectively. These comparisons and revisions aim to refine the project's scope and effectiveness, ensuring it aligns more closely with current needs and future projections.
For those interested in reviewing the adjustments or contributing feedback, the details can be accessed directly through the project's GitHub pull request at [GitHub Pull Request #73](https://github.com/lightning/blips/pull/73). This platform continues to welcome feedback from all contributors to foster improvements and collaboration.
